report.summary: Drafted 10 social posts (milestone, security guide, L2 thread, market outlook, newsletter, sprint poll), created 3 SVG social cards, and planned the Mar 22-28 content calendar — pivoting from FOMC coverage to evergreen content and Sprint 60 community engagement.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: 414 Pages Milestone tweet — celebrates full publish queue completion with key stats
DeFi Security Guide spotlight tweet — drives traffic to high-value blog post
Layer 2 Comparison thread (5-part) — Base vs Arbitrum vs zkSync educational thread
Weekly Market Outlook tweet — Mon macro + tool links
Discord/Telegram week recap + community poll on next sprint direction
Bitcoin Halving guide tweet — evergreen learn content spotlight
Portfolio Tracker tool spotlight tweet — feature highlight
Weekly Newsletter (Thu) — 414 milestone, DeFi security, L2 comparison, Sprint 60 planning
Sprint 60 Poll tweet — community engagement on next build priorities
Weekend engagement tweet — 'unpopular opinion' format driving learn section traffic

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: 2026-03-22-social-card-milestone.svg — 1200x630 OG card featuring 414 number with stats grid (114 tools, 200+ guides, 38 reviews, 8 languages)
2026-03-22-social-card-defi-security.svg — 1200x630 OG card with shield icon and topic badges (audits, wallets, phishing, multi-sig)
2026-03-22-social-card-l2-comparison.svg — 1200x630 three-column comparison card (Base vs Arbitrum vs zkSync)

sections.title: Analytics Insights
items: 414 pages fully deployed — publish queue empty for first time
Site idle for 5 days since last deploy (Mar 17, Day 64)
All 6 API data routes healthy; 5/6 with confirmed uptime
Content categories with highest volume: Tools (114 pages), Learn (200+), Exchanges (19), Wallets (19)
Recent high-value content: DeFi Security guide, L2 Comparison, FOMC guide, Crypto Cards (8 reviews), Hyperliquid trading guide

sections.title: Content Calendar (Mar 22-28)
items: Sun Mar 22: Milestone tweet + DeFi security + L2 thread (Twitter)
Mon Mar 23: Market outlook (Twitter) + Week recap (Discord/Telegram)
Tue Mar 24: Bitcoin halving guide (Twitter)
Wed Mar 25: Portfolio tracker spotlight (Twitter)
Thu Mar 26: Weekly newsletter (Email)
Fri Mar 27: Sprint 60 poll + weekend engagement (Twitter)

sections.title: Community Growth Notes
items: Shifting from event-driven content (FOMC) to evergreen + community engagement
Sprint 60 poll to gauge community interest: options viewer, dApp guides, chain ecosystems, yield optimizer
Newsletter pivoting to milestone celebration + forward-looking sprint planning
No bug reports or user feedback to process this cycle (quiet period)
